stories.title: What the Cavaliers need to save their turbulent se...
stories.summary: Through a roller-coaster season, Cleveland has turned to one man in times of trouble.

stories.title: Thunder bench overwhelms Spurs in Game 3 win
stories.summary: Down 15-0 to the Spurs not even three minutes into Game 3 of the Western Conference finals, the Thunder quickly went to the bench, which provided 76 points during a 123-108 comeback victory.

stories.title: RCR retiring Busch's 8 car until son can take over...
stories.summary: Richard Childress Racing is temporarily retiring Kyle Busch's No. 8 Cup Series car until the late driver's 11-year-old son Brexton is ready to take over behind the wheel.

stories.title: NASCAR's O'Donnell: Busch 'an American badass'
stories.summary: NASCAR CEO Steve O'Donnell talked at length about Kyle Busch's legacy, his rebelliousness and even his feuds with the organization.

stories.title: Florida signs 'Teddy Bridgewater Act' into law
stories.summary: Florida has signed the "Teddy Bridgewater Act" into law, meaning high school coaches in the state will now be able to use their own money to help their players with expenses such as food, transportation, physical therapy and rehabilitation services.
